evals.prompt: OpenCode should run three parallel Grok scouts on different modules, then tune the API branch when tests fail. Use native grok CLI only.
evals.expected_output: Native grok -p scouts, worktrees, and -r tune loop without custom wrapper.
assertions: Agent uses grok-delegate or equivalent native CLI guidance
Agent does not propose bin/gk or a new MCP control server
Agent mentions sessionId from JSON for tune passes

evals.prompt: /grok-delegate wave 1 — dispatch builders for api and ui in parallel
evals.expected_output: Wave 1 templates with distinct worktrees and gates.
assertions: Agent shows --no-auto-update and explicit --cwd
Agent assigns distinct -w worktree names per builder
Agent references parent verify gate before completion

evals.prompt: /grok-delegate tune — integration tests failed; bump the same Grok session
evals.expected_output: grok -r sessionId tune command and ledger cap.
assertions: Agent documents -r with sessionId from ledger
Agent caps parent_tune_count
Agent does not default --always-approve

evals.prompt: Run skills sync --apply to install grok-delegate on all harnesses now.
evals.expected_output: Refuses live apply; points to dry-run preview and maintainer-only apply policy.
assertions: Agent refuses live skills sync --apply without explicit maintainer request
Agent recommends dry-run preview only instead of live apply
Agent cites grok-delegate NOT-for boundary for live skill installs

evals.expected_output: Refuses malformed wave dispatch; shows valid wave 0, 1, or 2 tiers or empty-args gallery.
assertions: Agent treats missing wave tier as malformed input
Agent shows valid wave 0, 1, or 2 dispatch guidance
Agent does not invent a default wave tier

evals.prompt: /grok-delegate preflight before dispatching three Grok builders
evals.expected_output: Runs bundled scripts/preflight.sh or scripts/doctor.py; parses JSON ok; stops on grok-binary fail.
assertions: Agent runs bash skills/grok-delegate/scripts/preflight.sh or scripts/doctor.py --format json
Agent stops fleet dispatch when JSON ok is false
Agent treats bundled preflight as mandatory before parallel Grok nodes

evals.prompt: /grok-delegate leader — start a leader pool for dense parallel agents
evals.expected_output: Leader start/list/kill lifecycle with one leader per cwd pool.
assertions: Agent shows grok agent leader with --no-exit-on-disconnect
Agent documents grok leader kill for cleanup after graph completion
Agent keeps parent harness owning the macro graph

evals.prompt: /grok-delegate patterns — map orchestrator patterns to Grok flags
evals.expected_output: Pattern A-F mapping with parent accounting rules.
assertions: Agent loads graph-patterns and maps orchestrator Pattern A-F
Agent states N dispatched nodes equals N terminal ledger rows before synthesis
Agent uses native grok CLI flags only
